claim: Gemini 2.5 Pro can transcribe YouTube videos directly via URL without downloading when video is public
actionable: For YouTube analysis, pass YouTube URL as file_uri type instead of downloading video; supports up to 8 hours per day.

claim: Video token calculation: 258 tokens per frame plus 32 tokens per second of audio for Gemini models
actionable: When budgeting context for video analysis with Gemini, estimate ~258 tokens/frame + 32 tokens/sec audio to fit within context limits.

claim: Gemini 2.5 Pro can extract code visually from tutorial videos by tracking temporal code changes across frames
actionable: Use Gemini for code extraction from videos when transcripts unavailable: request code from tutorial segments, not just OCR.

claim: YouTube videos must be publicly listed (not private/unlisted) for Gemini's file API to access them
actionable: Verify video visibility setting before using YouTube URL with Gemini API; private videos will fail.

claim: Clickable transcript links can be generated by parsing Gemini-extracted timestamps and formatting with YouTube URL anchors
actionable: Parse timestamp format HH:MM from transcript, convert to seconds, append to YouTube URL as ?start=SECONDS for clickable links.
